basic_details.job_title: DGFT Hyderabad Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT Hyderabad) Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Directorate General of Foreign Trade. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DGFT Hyderabad Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Economics, MBA, B. Tech/BE/MCA, Masters in Commerce
qualification.details: Masters in Economics from a recognized University – Min 70% Master in Business Administration (MBA) – min 70% from a recognized university B. Tech/BE/MCA from a recognized university – min 70% Masters in Commerce – min 70%

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Young Professional post at DGFT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Young Professional position at DGFT Hyderabad is 10th June 2026. Ensure all your details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Economics, Business Administration (MBA), Commerce, or a B. Tech/BE/MCA degree, all with a minimum of 70% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 35 years, as of 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional position at DGFT Hyderabad through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional post will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 60,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional role will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Young Professional post at DGFT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Young Professional position at DGFT Hyderabad is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Young Professional post is Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: You can apply online for the Young Professional post by visiting the official website of DGFT Hyderabad or through the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date.
